title: Text Embeddings Inference
author: OrcVole
tagline: Fast text embeddings and reranking server (HuggingFace TEI)

apikey.message: Get your API key: open a Terminal for this app (the `>_` button) and run `cat /app/data/.secrets/keys.env`. Send it as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` to the embedding endpoints.

model.message: First boot downloads the embedding model (the default, `BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5`, is ~130 MB and ready in well under a minute). To serve a different model, set `TEI_MODEL_ID` in the app's Environment and restart.
